meaning: adj.特许的,让步的n.让步,特许
examples: For these poorest countries, IDA gives grants and concessionary loans.
Concessionary ticket holders are required to present valid identity documents during admission.
Under a concessionary agreement the company would hold title to the resources that are produced.
The cabinet said it would look at setting up a self-financing concessionary transport scheme.
He has refused to incur further foreign debts except on the most concessionary terms.
